name: Daily Draw: For Lucky
description: Daily fortune telling based on Guanyin Oracle (观音灵签). Contains 100 complete oracle sticks with interpretations and stories. One draw per day. Covers Career, Love, Health, and Wealth.
description_cn: 每日观音灵签抽签，包含100签完整签文、解曰和典故。每天只能抽取一次，签文涵盖事业、姻缘、健康、财运等方面指引。使用：'/draw' 或 '帮我抽个签' 触发。
author: Lyandy & ColorPepper (彩椒)
